playbook.intent: Post a written standup that survives 6-9h offset → blockers surfaced inside client SLA, no 'why didn't you say something' escalations.
playbook.scope: Atomic daily ceremony: a written standup that bridges the 6-9h offset between an offshore senior and a US/AU client. By cycle close: blockers visible, dependencies handed off cleanly, no escalation about silence. Repeated daily; refined weekly.

success-criteria.criterion: Written standup posted daily inside the agreed window
Every blocker tagged with the named owner the client expects to respond
Handoff items visible to incoming timezone before they log on
Zero 'why didn't you say something' escalations in a month

stage.name: Capture
stage.intent: Collect the four sections before you write a word.

tasks.task: List yesterday's shipped items with PR links
List today's planned work with target outcomes
List active blockers with owner + ETA expectation
List handoff items for the incoming timezone

outputs.output: Draft sections in a scratch doc

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when blocker section has a named owner per item. Anonymous blockers are noise.

stage.name: Compose
stage.intent: Turn the draft into a post the client PM forwards without rewriting.

tasks.task: Lead with blockers, not yesterday's wins
Add one explicit ask per blocker

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if a stranger could read the post and know what to do next.

stage.name: Handoff
stage.intent: Make sure the incoming timezone sees what they need to.

tasks.task: Post in the agreed channel inside the window
Tag the on-call from the receiving timezone
Pin handoff items if blockers need overnight movement
Log the post in the engagement journal

stage.decision-gate: Done when at least one named tag has acknowledged. If not, ping after the timezone overlaps.

extra.value: [Replacing the live sync — covers the days without one, Status reporting upward — that's the weekly report]
[Shared async channel (Slack / Teams / Discord) agreed, Client SLA on blocker response defined, Standup template agreed with client PM]
[Writing 'no blockers' when there are blockers — kills trust by week 3, Vague handoff items the receiving timezone cannot action, Posting outside the agreed window — the post then floats unseen]
['Did I lead with blockers and the named owner?', 'Could the client PM forward this without rewriting?', 'Did I name the next decision, not just the work?']

{human: faion get-content cross-timezone-async-daily-standup --format md, agent: faion get-content cross-timezone-async-daily-standup --format context, json: faion get-content cross-timezone-async-daily-standup --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
